title: teucrium cubense subsp. laevigatum
intro: Teucrium cubense subsp. laevigatum, also known as Cuban germander, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Teucrium cubense subsp. laevigatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
